---
title: "Home"
---

::: {.intro-hero}
<img src="./images/rockstedy_logo_03.png" alt="Rocksteady Analytics rhino logo" class="about-brand-logo">
<div class="intro-title-stack">
<p class="intro-hero-title">Medallion Fund Reconstruction</p>
<p class="intro-hero-tagline">Quantitative archaeology from public evidence only.</p>
</div>
:::

::: {.disclaimer-banner}
**Public research site.** This is an evidence-graded reconstruction for education—not investment advice, not insider knowledge, and not affiliated with Renaissance Technologies. See [About](about.qmd) for the full disclaimer and licenses.
:::

*New here? Read the [Introduction](intro.qmd).*

## Mission

Build the highest-fidelity **public** reconstruction possible of the scientific, statistical, computational, organizational, and market mechanisms that could plausibly explain Medallion’s historical performance—using only public sources, academic analogues, and reproducible (toy) experiments.

<p class="site-credit">Site by <strong>Nate Vavrock</strong> · <strong>Rocksteady Analytics</strong></p>

## How to read this site

| Section | Content |
|---------|---------|
| [Chapter I — History](chapters/01-history.qmd) | Timeline, strategy evolution, key figures |
| [Chapter II — Data](chapters/02-data.qmd) | Historical data availability (1980–2025) |
| [Chapter III — Signals](chapters/03-signals.qmd) | Signal hypothesis database |
| [Chapter IV — Execution](chapters/04-execution.qmd) | Microstructure and execution edge |
| [Chapter V — Risk](chapters/05-risk.qmd) | Six-layer risk stack |
| [Chapter VI — Organization](chapters/06-organization.qmd) | Culture vs peer quant firms |
| [Chapter VII — Experiments](chapters/07-experiments.qmd) | Computational reconstructions |
| [Chapter VIII — Synthesis](chapters/08-synthesis.qmd) | Integrated conclusions |
| [Evidence registry](appendices/evidence-registry.qmd) | All claims with rubric metadata |

## Cite this work

Repository: [github.com/nvavrock/medallion](https://github.com/nvavrock/medallion)

Live site: [https://nvavrock.github.io/medallion/](https://nvavrock.github.io/medallion/)

## Reproduce locally

```bash
git clone https://github.com/nvavrock/medallion.git
cd medallion
make install
make reproduce   # tests + experiments
make site        # build this website
make preview     # live preview
```
